text: Being here, I am struck by the contrast between the clean, almost sterile glass meeting rooms and the vibrant, stimulating display of the R+D space. I feel a subtle tension between order and creative chaos. The quietness and emptiness around me sharpen my senses, inviting curiosity and contemplation about how spaces influence thought, interaction, and the blending of human and machine intelligence. There is a strange comfort in modern emptiness—a feeling both inspiring and slightly detached.
